name: Favorite Fish Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Fat-Free Mayonnaise OR Low-Fat Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, gently combine the cooked fish, grapes, celery, mayonnaise or yogurt, almonds, salt, and curry powder.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated.
3. Serve on a bed of leaf lettuce.
